ナビゲーション・リンクをスキップ
  • モジュール
  • パッケージ
  • クラス
  • 階層ツリー
  • 索引
  • ヘルプ
SEARCH

すべてのクラスおよびインタフェース

クラス
説明
CollectionSupport
Static helpers shared by arbitrary Collection implementations (List, Set, Queue, …): presence checks, safe CollectionSupport.size(Collection), containment tests between collections, and ordered endpoints via SequencedCollection where applicable.
Contracts
Internal helpers enforcing NonNegative and Positive contracts at runtime.
EastAsianWidthColumns
East Asian display column width from Unicode EastAsianWidth.txt 15.1.0 (UAX #11).
IdGenerator<T>
Generates identifiers of type T.
LengthCounter
Strategy for measuring the "length" of a CharSequence.
Lengths
Built-in LengthCounter strategies.
MapSupport
Static helpers for Map work: null-safe emptiness checks, default substitution, and typed reads with fallbacks.
NonNegative
Marks a numeric type usage intended to be zero or greater: primitive integrals (int, long, …) — >= 0; non-NaN floating-point — >= 0.0.
NonNull
Marks a type usage whose value must not be null.
Nullable
Marks a type usage whose value may be null.
NumberSupport
Static helpers for numeric strings and simple bounds: digit checks, JDK-compatible parsing with optional defaults, and clamp.
ObjectSupport
Static helpers aligned with Objects: almost every method forwards to the JDK so semantics stay identical to the platform.
Positive
Marks a numeric type usage intended to be strictly positive.
StringSupport
Static helpers for String and CharSequence work: presence checks, safe defaults, content equality, and trimming helpers.
UuidV4IdGenerator
IdGenerator for RFC 4122 version-4 (random) UUIDs.
